narrative.description: Nintendo's Wii masterpiece sends Mario across spherical planetoids with gravity-normalized running, launch stars, and orchestral hub progression through the Comet Observatory.
narrative.core_loop: Collect Power Stars on planetoid courses, unlock observatory domes with star totals, and defeat Bowser across gravity-shifting galactic stages.

mechanics.map_notes: Each planetoid has its own gravity pole; Mario walks seamlessly around spheres.
mechanics.expression: Each planetoid has its own gravity pole; Mario walks seamlessly around spheres.

mechanics.map_notes: Comet Observatory domes unlock via Power Star totals feeding Rosalina's story.
mechanics.expression: Comet Observatory domes unlock via Power Star totals feeding Rosalina's story.

mechanics.map_notes: Power Stars and Luigi stars gate dome access and ending requirements.
mechanics.expression: Power Stars and Luigi stars gate dome access and ending requirements.

mechanics.map_notes: Spin attacks and long jumps adapt to local gravity vectors.
mechanics.expression: Spin attacks and long jumps adapt to local gravity vectors.

mechanics.map_notes: Prankster Comets and purple coin missions demand exact movement.
mechanics.expression: Prankster Comets and purple coin missions demand exact movement.

mechanics.map_notes: Secret stars, Luigi missions, and comet variants extend completion.
mechanics.expression: Secret stars, Luigi missions, and comet variants extend completion.

mechanics.map_notes: Bowser encounters gate observatory story milestones.
mechanics.expression: Bowser encounters gate observatory story milestones.

mechanics.map_notes: Bowser fights span gravity-flipping arena phases.
mechanics.expression: Bowser fights span gravity-flipping arena phases.

mechanics.map_notes: Bee, Boo, Spring, and Ice Mario caps alter traversal.
mechanics.expression: Bee, Boo, Spring, and Ice Mario caps alter traversal.

mechanics.map_notes: Black holes, lava oceans, and electric rails test adaptation.
mechanics.expression: Black holes, lava oceans, and electric rails test adaptation.

mechanics.map_notes: Bosses like King Kaliente follow learnable attack cycles.
mechanics.expression: Bosses like King Kaliente follow learnable attack cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Stars persist; death respawns at course entrance.
mechanics.expression: Stars persist; death respawns at course entrance.

mechanics.map_notes: Bowser's fireball waves telegraph with audio cues.
mechanics.expression: Bowser's fireball waves telegraph with audio cues.

mechanics.map_notes: Spin and jump stomp clear Chomps and fodder enemies.
mechanics.expression: Spin and jump stomp clear Chomps and fodder enemies.

mechanics.map_notes: Fire and ice flowers gate specific puzzle solutions.
mechanics.expression: Fire and ice flowers gate specific puzzle solutions.

mechanics.map_notes: Health wedges deplete on hazard hits; stars remain collected.
mechanics.expression: Health wedges deplete on hazard hits; stars remain collected.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Super Mario Galaxy through its core platformer loop.
